title: tateishia retusa
side_effects: Tateishia retusa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In severe cases, improper use of Tateishia retusa can cause seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits.
